# Insert X=55, after (slide 71). Order m=3.
#
# Leaf g=[45,50] overflows on 55; median 50 is promoted into parent c, and g
# splits into [45] and a new node [55]. c has room, so no further split.
#
#                       [30]                          a (root)
#                     /      \
#                 [20]        [40,50]                 b   c
#                /    \      /   |    \
#          [10,15] [25] [35,38] [45] [55]             d  e  f  g  h
root 1
1  1  2  30 3
2  1  4  20 5
3  2  6  40 7  50 8
4  2  0  10 0  15 0
5  1  0  25 0
6  2  0  35 0  38 0
7  1  0  45 0
8  1  0  55 0
